channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Cloudflare says it’s investigating the outage that brought down Zoom and LinkedIn
item.description: Internet infrastructure company Cloudflare on Friday said it was investigating an outage that took place in the morning that brought down several global websites including LinkedIn, Zoom and others, the second such crash to affect the company in less than three weeks.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: US security agency urges Android and iPhone users to stop using personal VPNs
item.description: CISA warned that many commercial VPNs could be putting your data at greater risk. But that doesn't mean you should give up on privacy – here's what you need to know.
item.dc:creator: Rene Millman, TechRadar

item.title: Vertical AI development agents are the future of enterprise integrations
item.description: Enterprise Application Integration (EAI) and modern iPaaS platforms have become two of the most strategically important – and resource-constrained – functions inside today’s enterprises.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: OpenAI prompts AI models to ‘confess’ when they cheat
item.description: OpenAI’s research team has trained its GPT-5 large language model to “confess” when it doesn’t follow instructions, providing a second output after its main answer that reports when the model didn’t do as it was told, cut corners, hallucinated, or was uncertain of its answer.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Christmas shopping? AI tools can help you make the most of the holiday rush
item.description: Shopping assistant chatbots were a novelty a year ago. Now, they’re everywhere. After rolling out AI-powered assistants, online retailers and tech companies have been adding more artificial intelligence features to make online shopping easier and more convenient.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Looking to supercharge your Raspberry Pi? This adapter provides two full-sized HDMI ports and a PCIe connector - and it only costs $10
item.description: The $10 Waveshare adapter expands Raspberry Pi 5 connectivity through dual HDMI support and a functional PCIe M.2 slot.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen, TechRadar

item.title: Cybersecurity in focus: DOJ aggressively investigating contractors’ cybersecurity practices
item.description: Federal contractors should ensure that they understand and operationalize their contractual obligations, particularly with respect to the new DFARS obligations.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Timeline of HPE’s $14 billion Juniper acquisition
item.description: AI is a key factor in one of the tech industry’s most significant M&A developments: HPE’s proposed acquisition of Juniper Networks. The $14 billion deal would shake up the industry, and regulatory watchdogs in the U.S. and worldwide have raised antitrust concerns.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Russia restricts FaceTime, its latest step in controlling online communications
item.description: Russian authorities say they have imposed restrictions on Apple's video calling service FaceTime, alleging it was being used for organizing what it called “terrorist activities.”.
item.dc:creator: Dasha Litvinova, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: India withdraws demand for forced installation of government app
item.description: The other day ComputerSweden reported that the Indian government had demanded that all mobile phones in the country be equipped with the government app Sanchar Saathi within 90 days.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Developers urged to immediately upgrade React, Next.js
item.description: Developers using the React 19 library for building application interfaces are urged to immediately upgrade to the latest version because of a critical vulnerability that can be easily exploited by an attacker to remotely run their own code.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft retires Mesh app, launches ‘immersive spaces’ for Teams
item.description: Microsoft has retired its Mesh 3D collaboration platform as it continues to scale back its metaverse ambitions in the workplace.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The complete guide to Node.js frameworks
item.description: Node.js is one of the most popular server-side platforms, especially for web applications. It gives you non-blocking JavaScript without a browser, plus an enormous ecosystem. That ecosystem is one of Node’s chief strengths, making it a go-to option for server development.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: A first look at Google’s new Antigravity IDE
item.description: Once upon a time, IDEs focused on specific languages, like Visual Studio IDE for Microsoft C++ or IntelliJ IDEA for Java. But now there is a new wave of IDEs dedicated to agentic AI workflows.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Nvidia: Latest news and insights
item.description: More processor coverage on Network World: Intel news and insights | AMD news and insights With its legacy of innovation in GPU technology, Nvidia has become a dominant force in the AI market. Nvidia’s partners read like a technology who’s who list – e.g.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Microsoft’s Copilot+ PC hype needs to end, analysts say
item.description: Microsoft should drop the Copilot+ moniker for AI PCs, as it has sown confusion among buyers and failed to deliver on over-hyped promises, according to analysts. Copilot+ Windows 11 PCs were first introduced in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: LogicMonitor closes Catchpoint buy, targets AI observability
item.description: LogicMonitor announced it has completed its acquisition of Catchpoint for more than $250 million, combining hybrid observability and internet performance monitoring capabilities to address the increasing complexity of AI infrastructure and distributed workloads.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: AWS Transform now supports agentic modernization of custom code
item.description: Does AI-generated code add to, or reduce, technical debt? Amazon Web Services is aiming to reduce it with the addition of new capabilities to AWS Transform, its AI-driven service for modernizing legacy code, applications, and infrastructure.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: What is co-packaged optics? A solution for surging capacity in AI data center networks
item.description: The proliferation of artificial intelligence workloads is creating concern about the ability of data center networks to keep up with demand. One part of the solution is co-packaged optics (CPO), which involves incorporating optical technology more deeply into data center network switches.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: AWS unveils Frontier AI agents for software development
item.description: Amazon Web Services has unveiled a new class of AI agents, called frontier agents, which the company said can work for hours or days without intervention. The first three agents are focused on software development tasks.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Akamai acquires Fermyon for edge computing as WebAssembly comes of age
item.description: WebAssembly (commonly also known simply as Wasm) began as a browser technology for running high-performance applications in web environments.
item.dc:creator: Network World
